ModMetaData.name: AI Portrait Forge
ModMetaData.author: Fork of Avatar - Personas by Meathax & bolphen, expanded by sitariom
ModMetaData.description: AI-generated portraits for ANY pawn — humans, animals, mechs, creatures. 40 art styles, 6 cloud API providers, 22 creature categories. Automatic background removal. No local GPU required. Fork of Avatar - Personas (steam://url/CommunityFilePage/3111373293) and Avatar (steam://url/CommunityFilePage/3726781409).
